summary: W1459 refines the W1458 W987 construction by splitting the bundled W945 localized-unit input into a bounded homotopy localized right adjoint, localized adjunction, and W939 unit-component witness, constructing W945, then feeding the resulting W1458 input to assemble W722, W719, W948, W949, W950, W984, W717, W716, W730, W986, and W987 with projection theorems back to those localized-unit, endpoint, source-triangulation, fixed-target, target, relation, and boundary fields. Product success remains false because no positive OriginalFourTaskProductSuccess witness exists and the final imported original four-task completion surface still proves productSuccessClaimed=false.
known_gaps: Positive Lean witness is absent: ProductSuccessDeclarations.lean does not import or check an OriginalFourTaskProductSuccess surface with field-level evidence for the four original tasks.
Final imported completion surface remains nonterminal: originalFourTaskContractCompletion.productSuccessClaimed = false still compiles.

Original four mathematical tasks remain open under the positive-witness supplement; W1459 constructs W987 from two raw boundary fields, two raw relation fields, W944 target no-univ data, W973 closed-embedding closedness data, a normalized lift blueprint, target fixed-target uniqueness, localization-model fixed-target uniqueness, source pretriangulated structure, source triangulated structure, source triangle-completion input, endpoint strict-exact witnesses, bounded homotopy localized right adjoint, localized adjunction, and W939 unit-component witness rather than proving those inputs from a positive product witness.
remaining_work: Continue Lean implementation toward a positive OriginalFourTaskProductSuccess-style declaration backed by actual exact-category, metrizable LCA exact-category, Yoneda-Ext, and bounded derived infinity-category constructions.

Discharge the W1459 raw boundary-field, raw relation-field, W944, W973, normalized lift blueprint, target fixed-target uniqueness, localization-model fixed-target uniqueness, source pretriangulated, source triangulated, triangle-completion, endpoint strict-exact, bounded homotopy localized right adjoint, localized adjunction, and W939 unit-component inputs with real Lean constructions satisfying the positive-witness supplement, or replace them with an explicit positive witness.
Before any future product-success claim, rerun the source-contradiction gate, negative fixtures, clean checkout verification, root external audit, and clean-extracted packet audit.
